summary: Stunning first half with beautiful performances of Eternity, Mexicali and several classics; recording quality not detailed but the show is regarded as an all‑time great.
review: The reviewer hails the opening portion of this concert as a showcase of exceptional beauty, highlighting Eternity, Mexicali, Lazy River Road, Greatest Story, Minglewood and Big River as top‑notch performances. Although the second set is described as weaker, the overall impression is that the show ranks among the band’s all‑time greats. No specific recording‑quality comments were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises the musical performance heavily, especially the first half; lack of recording details keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound quality or source; assumed listenable based on high overall rating.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First half praised as fantastically beautiful and powerful; second half considered weaker, but the overall concert remains a standout.
